metadata.lyrics:
[01:29.68] Can you hear me calling
[01:31.60] Out your name?
[01:34.20] You know that I'm falling
[01:35.86] And I don't know what to say
[01:38.63] I'll speak a little louder
[01:40.76] I'll even shout
[01:43.12] You know that I'm proud
[01:44.65] And I can't get the words out
[01:46.45] Oh, I
[01:52.38] I want to be with you everywhere
[01:55.87] Oh, I
[02:01.66] I want to be with you everywhere
[02:04.27] (Wanna be with you everywhere)
[02:14.46] Something's happening
[02:16.52] Happening to me
[02:18.81] My friends say I'm acting peculiarly
[02:23.46] Come on, baby
[02:24.84] We better make a start
[02:28.08] You better make it soon
[02:29.05] Before you break my heart
[02:31.49] Oh, I
[02:37.22] I want to be with you everywhere
[02:40.08] Oh, I
[02:46.23] I want to be with you everywhere
[02:48.98] (Wanna be with you everywhere)
[02:51.15]
